feed.description: Investing conversations for normal humans: frameworks, risk, and the habits that matter more than predictions.
feed.title: Long Horizon Notes

bullets: Welcome back to Long Horizon Notes. Today we're talking about index investing, and I'm joined by Daniel, former bond trader turned index advocate. Daniel, thanks for being here.
Thanks, Nora. Excited for this one — index investing is something I've been thinking about a lot.
How do you know when you've gotten it right? Where do people most often confuse correlation with causation in this area?
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Long Horizon Notes. Today we're talking about index investing, and I'm joined by Daniel, former bond trader turned index advocate. Daniel, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Index Investing Without the Myths
